svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "Opera Reel"

text.tspan: D D/A D G/A | D/A D/G D/G A/D
D D/A D G/A | D/A D/G D/G A/D
Source: KY Contra Tunes and some online variants
Notes: This is interesting! Basically the usual A and B parts, but each part seems to have distinct
variations on each. Also neat that the A part resolves on the dominant instead of the tonic.
